verses.text: 'The LORD's hand is not shortened, that it cannot save'; rather 'your iniquities have separated between you and your God.' The fault is theirs. Sin, not any weakness in God, is what cuts us off from His help.

'The LORD's hand is not shortened, that it cannot save'; rather 'your iniquities have separated between you and your God.' The fault is theirs. Sin, not any weakness in God, is what cuts us off from His help.

'The LORD's hand is not shortened, that it cannot save'; rather 'your iniquities have separated between you and your God.' The fault is theirs. Sin, not any weakness in God, is what cuts us off from His help.

None pleads for truth; they conceive mischief, hatch vipers' eggs, and 'the way of peace they know not.' Corruption is everywhere. A society given to deceit and violence has lost the very road to peace.

Therefore judgment is far from them; they grope for light but find darkness, growling like bears and mourning like doves. Sin brings gloom. The people who forsook God stumble in a darkness of their own making.

Therefore judgment is far from them; they grope for light but find darkness, growling like bears and mourning like doves. Sin brings gloom. The people who forsook God stumble in a darkness of their own making.

Therefore judgment is far from them; they grope for light but find darkness, growling like bears and mourning like doves. Sin brings gloom. The people who forsook God stumble in a darkness of their own making.

They confess their many transgressions; 'truth is fallen in the street,' and the LORD saw that there was no justice, and it displeased Him. God is grieved by it. The collapse of truth and justice never escapes His notice.

He saw 'no man... no intercessor,' so 'his arm brought salvation,' clad in righteousness and zeal. God saves alone. When no human help could be found, He Himself undertook redemption.

'The Redeemer shall come to Zion,' and God's Spirit and words shall not depart from His people. Paul cites this of Christ. The promised Redeemer comes, and the covenant of the Spirit and the word abides for ever.
